brandStory.title: Relaxation, as part of life
brandStory.pullquote: To bring real relaxation closer to people.
brandStory.paragraph1: Life keeps getting busier. Time for quiet keeps getting shorter. We believe relaxation should be part of everyday life — not just something you look for on holiday or at a spa.
brandStory.paragraph2: WaterVibes offers jacuzzis for private homes, guesthouses and hotels. We select models that deliver comfort, efficient hydromassage, and reliable technical systems. Each jacuzzi is chosen to provide a genuine experience of relaxation through water.
brandStory.paragraph3: WaterVibes doesn't just offer products. It creates spaces of relaxation that can become part of your everyday life.

about.title: About
about.description: Why WaterVibes exists, how we build the offering, and what exactly we offer. Three chapters about relaxation becoming part of everyday life.

hero.title: Relaxation, as part of life
hero.subhead: Three chapters on why we exist, how we build the offering, and what exactly we offer.

chapter1.title: Why WaterVibes exists
chapter1.paragraph1: WaterVibes grew out of a simple idea. People need real relaxation. Life gets busy. Schedules fill up. Moments of quiet become rare. Many people look for relaxation on holidays or at spas — and that calm disappears the moment they come home.
chapter1.paragraph2: We believe relaxation shouldn't be an occasional luxury. It should be part of everyday life. Every home, guesthouse or hotel can have a space dedicated to relaxation. A place where the body lets go. A place where the mind stops running the day's pace. A place where people spend time that matters.
chapter1.paragraph3: Water has a real effect on the body. Hydromassage relaxes muscles. The warmth of the water reduces tension. The jets stimulate circulation. Within a few minutes, a deep state of relaxation sets in. That's where the WaterVibes idea starts. We don't just sell products — we build experiences of relaxation that can be part of everyday life.
chapter1.paragraph4: A jacuzzi changes how people use the space around their home. The terrace becomes a place to relax. The courtyard becomes a place to meet. The evening becomes a moment of quiet. For guesthouses and hotels, the experience matters even more — a space with a jacuzzi turns a simple stay into something memorable. WaterVibes exists for this: to make real relaxation accessible in every home and in every place dedicated to hospitality.

chapter2.title: How we do it
chapter2.paragraph1: WaterVibes builds its offering with a clear goal: to provide relaxation solutions that fit as many spaces, styles and needs as possible.
chapter2.paragraph2: We select every jacuzzi model carefully. We look at comfort, material quality, hydromassage performance, and the reliability of the technical systems. We choose models that deliver a genuine spa experience and that can be used constantly, without compromises.
chapter2.paragraph3: The WaterVibes portfolio is designed to cover a wide range of requirements. We offer jacuzzis in different sizes — for two people, for families, or for larger groups. There are compact models for smaller terraces or courtyards, and spacious models for guesthouses or hotels.
chapter2.paragraph4: We include models with different jet configurations for hydromassage. Each seat in a jacuzzi offers a different kind of massage, designed to relax muscles and release accumulated tension.
chapter2.paragraph5: Design matters. We select jacuzzis in colours and finishes that integrate easily into modern or classic spaces. A jacuzzi should complete the terrace, the garden, or the relaxation zone — and become part of the atmosphere of the place. Technology matters just as much. We select filtration, heating, and water-control systems chosen for comfort and optimal energy use.
chapter2.paragraph6: The process continues with consultation on choosing the right model. We review the available space, how many people will use the jacuzzi, and how it will sit in the relaxation area. We provide guidance and recommendations for installation, so each customer understands the technical requirements and the steps needed to mount the jacuzzi correctly.

chapter3.title: What we actually offer
chapter3.paragraph1: WaterVibes offers water-based relaxation solutions for both private residences and hospitality venues. We select and supply modern jacuzzis designed for comfort, durability, and a real hydromassage experience.
chapter3.paragraph2: Each model is chosen to answer a different use — from private spaces to guesthouses and hotels that want to offer guests something extra, or for quality time with friends.
chapter3.paragraph3: Depending on the space and preferences, customers can choose indoor or outdoor models, with different sizes, seat counts, jet configurations and colour options. The goal is for each customer to find a model that fits both the available space and the style of the place.
chapter3.paragraph4: Consultation is part of what we offer. We help customers understand the differences between models and choose the right variant for their space, the number of users, and how they want to use the jacuzzi. Through this product selection and the support behind it, WaterVibes makes the spa experience more accessible and easier to integrate.
